data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. LADY GUNAI is coming off a 2.5 lengths fifth but in a speedy 16.72 at this track over 300m. Has the ability and looks hard to top. 4. OLIVER KELTON placed last time (24.58) at Sale in a Grade 4, finishing third and beaten 2.5 lengths. Has two wins already from this draw. Looks one of the chances. 7. NEVER EVER LATE was safely held last time out, finishing fifth at Geelong over 520m behind Tripped Out (30.83) in a Special conditions H. Was in the money the start prior. Has a strong record out of this box with three wins and two minor placings from seven starts. Expected to feature in the finish. 2. WALKING CARPET was in the money last time at Murray Bridge Straight (19.45) in a Grade 6, finishing a 1.3 lengths second. Has an unbeaten record from this draw, scoring two times.","runners":[3,4,7,2],"exclusive":false}
